CustomField.description: Initial Fund Balance for the Lease Agreement, which is set to a precision of six decimal places. However, the Balance Starting field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Initial Fund Balance for the Lease Agreement, which is set to a precision of six decimal places. However, the Balance Starting field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.label: Balance Starting (Precise)
